title: Ukraine receives new German IRIS-T air defence launcher amid continued Russian attacks
summary_full: Ukraine has received a new IRIS-T air defence launcher from Germany, bolstering its defenses against Russian missile and drone strikes. This latest delivery adds to previous transfers of the German-made medium-range surface-to-air missile system, which is crucial for protecting cities and infrastructure.
